underlying_goal: Resume work on Phase 57.4, then reframe the phase from a narrow tooling addition to a reconstructive rethinking of the auditing workflow, updating all project context files (CONTEXT, ROADMAP, STATE, REQUIREMENTS, reference files) to reflect this and committing in atomic chunks.
friction_detail: Claude initially missed indicating the recommended reading order in CONTEXT.md itself and only partially audited ROADMAP after claiming completeness, requiring user-prompted re-verification; user also interrupted once to expand the framing of the problem.
brief_summary: User wanted to resume Phase 57.4 work and then pivoted to a major reframing of the phase's scope with cascading documentation updates; Claude executed the reframing across 8 atomic commits with iterative verification prompted by the user.
